what_changed: Required strict V1 release-evidence comparison rows to carry positive finite latency speedups.

pr-evidence/v1-comparison-metric-validat.why: Release artifacts must not be able to pass strict V1 validation with malformed comparison metrics, because those metrics are the quality and efficiency summary used to compare document KV-cache reuse with no-cache prefill.
